text.title: QA Risk Matrix Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the risk-matrix + investment-plan artefact. The validator script enforces required keys and per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: refreshed_at older than current release cycle; areas count below 5; impact_rationale too short; likelihood_data missing; investment_plan entries too short; required_hours far exceeds team capacity.

list.pattern: All areas scored 4 or 5 on impact (flat ratings; matrix has no signal).
likelihood set without likelihood_data backing (subjective only).
matrix.refreshed_at older than the most recent release cycle.
HH quadrant areas exist but investment_plan.HH is empty or missing the owner.
capacity_check.required_hours > 1.5x team_capacity_hours without a documented capacity-or-cut plan.
